expectations.text: before_after_structure: Is there a clear Before/After visual structure?
expectations.evidence: `.columns` grid with `col-header before` / `col-header after` panels separated by center arrow column with reduction percentages

expectations.text: all_three_kpis: Are 処理時間, エラー率, 月間コスト all present?
expectations.evidence: 処理時間 (4時間→20分), エラー率 (12%→1.5%), 月間コスト (80万円→35万円) present in both before/after sections and summary cards

expectations.text: big_number_emphasis: Are numbers displayed in large/bold/colored text?
expectations.evidence: `.kpi-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800 }` with `.before-section .kpi-value { color: #ff7b72 }` and `.after-section .kpi-value { color: #56d364 }`; summary-change at 36px font-weight:900
No pptxgenjs library, no html2canvas library, no export button, and no export function anywhere in the file
